product.title: [Silver] Whistler 1-Day Tour(Departures on Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Sundays, with additional Fridays from May to September)

raw.productName: [Silver] Whistler 1-Day Tour(Departures on Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Sundays, with additional Fridays from May to September)
raw.productSpecial:
• Visit the beauty of Whistler and explore all that it has to offer.
  • Take a trip down the beautiful Sea to Sky Highway! 
  • Sea to Sky Highway offers the best views year-round! 
  • Explore one of the most popular stops at the magnificent Shannon Falls!
  • The best way to view Whistler and Black Comb mountain is to ride the Peak 2 Peak Gondola!
  • Embark on the legendary Sea to Sky Highway. Capture stunning views, discover waterfalls, soar by gondola, and arrive in the charming embrace of Whistler Village.
  • Soar to new heights on the Sea to Sky Gondola, a breathtaking journey from the ocean to the mountains.
  • Stroll the vibrant, pedestrian-only core of Whistler Village and experience a world-class mountain resort.
  • Experience the magic of Porteau Cove, a scenic oasis on the Sea-to-Sky known for its iconic pier, diving wrecks, and starlit campsites.
raw.departureDate:
10/20/2025-04/30/2026: Tuesday, Thursday, Sunday
05/01/2026-10/19/2026: Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, Sunday
10/20/2026-04/30/2027: Tuesday, Thursday, Sunday
Minimum of 1 person is required to be operated.
If children are included in the order, please note the age of the child in advance when booking the trip, otherwise the mandatory items will be charged on site as adult rate.

highlights.text:
- Visit the beauty of Whistler and explore all that it has to offer.

- Take a trip down the beautiful Sea to Sky Highway! 

- Sea to Sky Highway offers the best views year-round! 

- Explore one of the most popular stops at the magnificent Shannon Falls!

- The best way to view Whistler and Black Comb mountain is to ride the Peak 2 Peak Gondola!

- Embark on the legendary Sea to Sky Highway. Capture stunning views, discover waterfalls, soar by gondola, and arrive in the charming embrace of Whistler Village.

- Soar to new heights on the Sea to Sky Gondola, a breathtaking journey from the ocean to the mountains.

- Stroll the vibrant, pedestrian-only core of Whistler Village and experience a world-class mountain resort.

- Experience the magic of Porteau Cove, a scenic oasis on the Sea-to-Sky known for its iconic pier, diving wrecks, and starlit campsites.

itinerary.travelName: 【銀榜惠享】威士拿 1日遊（週二、週四、週日出發，5-9月加开週五）

decodedJson.description:
Depart from Vancouver and first visit Shannon Falls, where you can soak in the fresh scenery accompanied by the gentle gurgle of flowing water. Next, experience the Sea to Sky Gondola and immerse yourself in the magnificent vistas where the sea meets the mountains. Then head to Whistler to explore the charming town vibe. Finally, make your way to Porteau Cove Provincial Park to capture the beautiful lakeside views. Conclude the trip with a return to Vancouver—through the transition between stunning natural landscapes and quaint town charm, you’ll weave together diverse wonders and create pleasant memories of a nearby getaway.

 

Itinerary:
Vancouver → Shannon Falls (30 mins) → Sea to Sky Gondola (Optional, 120 mins) → Whistler (180 mins) → Porteau Cove Provincial Park (10 mins) → Vancouver

 

Tips:

If the SkyCable Car is temporarily closed due to maintenance or other reasons, the scheduled visit to that attraction will be cancelled. Please refer to the actual opening status of the attraction on the day of your tour.

content.sceniceDesc: Shannon Falls is located in Chief Stawamus Provincial Park. It is 335 meters high and is the third highest waterfall in the province. The waterfall is named after William Shannon, a brick manufacturer who settled here in the late 19th century. Compared with the turbulent waterfall, Shannon Falls is more gentle and charming. The water falls from the granite cliffs, flows into Howe Sound, and then into the Pacific Ocean.

Ascend the mountain by cable car and enjoy breathtaking views of the bay, majestic coastal forests, and surrounding mountains. Each cable car cabin accommodates up to eight passengers. The cabins are custom-made by a Swiss manufacturer, while the cable cars themselves are manufactured in Austria. The cable cars feature comfortable cushioned seats and floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing you to fully appreciate the magnificent scenery. The journey up and down the mountain is an exciting adventure for visitors of all ages, offering new views of Shannon Falls and the famous El Capitan climbing area along the way.

Whistler is the perfect place full of amazing adventures and attractions. Over two million people visit Whistler annually! It is primarily known for its amazing skiing and snowboarding! However, in the summer, mountain biking at Whistler Blackcomb is very popular. During the 2010 Winter Olympics, Whistler hosted most of the alpine, Nordic, luge, skeleton, and bobsled events.

Porto Bay Provincial Park is a 56-hectare seaside paradise, ideal for those seeking a relaxing beach getaway. During the day, the park boasts driftwood beaches, intertidal zones and marine life, shipwrecks, artificial reefs, picnic areas, and pebble beaches, making it a great place to explore nature. You can climb the steps of the lookout tower for clear views of Anville Island and the Sunshine Coast.

cost.excludesHtml:
1. 5% GST of all prices quoted in Canadian dollars.

2. Food and beverage.

3. Attraction admission fee (Prices are subject to change without prior notice; Tickets should be purchased from the tour guide).

4. Service fee (Minimum payment per person per day is USD$15/CAD$20, Any child and Infant reserving a seat have to pay the service fees as well).

5. Any personal expenses are not listed in Fee Included.

html.primary:
1. If the weather condition, war, general strikes, and other unforeseen circumstances interrupt the journey, our company reserves the right to rearrange the journey without refunding the tour fee. 

2. Cancellation & Re-schedule Policy:

    a.  More than 15 days prior to departure date (EST): Free cancellation with full refund. Please reconfirm the penalty for the added hotel or flight ticket.

    b.  Less than 14 days but 8 days prior to departure date (EST): 50% of total purchase amount can be refunded.

    c.  Less than 7 days prior to departure date (EST) or on departure day (EST): 100% penalty. No refund. 

    d.  Additional hotel bookings before or after the tour as well as other services are subject to hotel cancellation policy to determine if a refund is possible.

    e.  If the guest quit during the trip or fails to participate in any itinerary due to personal reasons (no travel documents, late arrival, illness, accident, etc.), the paid tour fare will not be refunded, and no other services will be compensated.

html.primary:
Know Before You Book

1. Customer under 18 years old MUST be accompanied by at least one adult. If the order includes children, please make sure to inform our customer service of the age of the children in advance when placing the order, otherwise the children will be charged on-site according as adults. In consideration of the guest safety, pregnant women are only allowed to join the tour if pregnant for 24 weeks or less by the end of the trip.

2. Please be sure to provide accurate and complete information upon booking. This includes name, gender, valid contact information (preferably a mobile phone), accurate tour location, etc., This helps to avoid any errors upon the reservation because errors affect travel. Any losses due to inaccurate or invalid information will be at your own cost and the company will not be held responsible. 

3. This tour does not accept any City Pass or your own tickets for any of the attractions. Tour attraction admission charges and meal expenses are subject to change at any time without notification. Any purchased ticket cannot be refunded for lower prices.

4. During the actual trip, the tour guide or driver has the right to appropriately adjust the tour sequence, stay time or assembly time of scenic spots according to the weather, traffic, and other conditions to ensure the smooth progress of the trip.

5. If any scenic spots are temporarily closed, including on certain holidays, the tour guide will make appropriate adjustments based on the actual situation, which may include viewing from the outside or substituting with another attraction to maintain the richness of the itinerary. Please note that the opening hours and capacity limits of certain attractions and national parks may change from time to time due to health concerns. Should such changes affect the itinerary, they will be considered force majeure. We appreciate your understanding.

6. Children under the age of 8 require a booster seat in order to participate in the tour group. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday provide the rental service for $10.00/person/day. Please make a request when booking the itinerary so that we may have the booster seat ready in advance. Please understand that the violations and fines are borne by the guests themselves. There is no need for a booster seat for bus travel on the day of travel, and the fee can be refunded to the guest.

7. Normal health conditions are required to participate and enjoy our full itineraries. Contact us for specific policies or information regarding passengers with disabilities and the handicapped who do need to provide advance notification to make a reservation. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday do not guarantee a wheelchair lift-equipped bus and/or seating availability to disabled passengers without prior notification and approval.

8. In order to make your trip more complete, pleasant and smooth, we strongly recommend that you choose to book event tickets, catering packages, etc. when making your order, and we do not provide any additional booking services within 7 days before the departure date and during the tour.

9. The price in the system is US dollars including tax. If you need to pay in CAD dollars, all CAD dollar prices do not include 5% GST.

10. Guests are required to bring their own relevant documents and materials required for entry or cross-border travel. Whether they can enter or leave the country is subject to the decision of the customs of each country. The inability to enter the country is a force majeure factor, and the paid tour fee will not be refunded.

11. We may alter these terms and conditions from time to time and post the new version on our agents’ website. It is your responsibility to check the [Terms & Conditions] on their website regularly and prior to making a reservation. Unless specifically stated otherwise herein or required by law, JUPITER LEGEND Corporation shall not be liable for any consequential, compensatory, indirect, incidental or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with the performance of its obligations under these terms and conditions.

12. Due to the continuous rise in fuel prices leading to a sharp increase in vehicle operating costs, effective for all tours departing on May 18, 2026, a transportation surcharge of CAD 5 per person per day will be applied to our tour products. The fee will be collected by tour guides during the trip.

 

Know Before You Go

1. The maximal waiting time for any late passengers is 10 minutes beyond the meeting time announced by the Tour Guide. While JUPITER LEGEND Corporation makes every effort to provide on-time service, it does not guarantee to arrive at or depart from any point.as a specific time, which may be affected by any number of factors including weather, traffic, strikes, government shutdowns, war or terrorist attacks, or mechanical prob- lems. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation is not liable for any inconvenience or expense caused as a result of such a delay, not liable for the expense of connecting air or train or bus service missed as a result of a delay and not liable for any other travel expense caused as a result of a delay.

2. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday reserve the right, when operating conditions require, transferring passengers from one vehicle to another en route.

3. The following documents are recommended to make your check-in process smooth: A valid photo ID is required to board the bus; We recommend you bring a copy of the email confirmation to board the bus.

4. This product is a group activity. If you choose to leave the group, please inform in advance, and obtain the consent of the tour guide. You need to sign the departure agreement form and the unfinished part will be regarded as your own abandonment. The group fee will not be refunded.

5. Gift items in the itinerary that cannot be given away due to force majeure factors such as traffic and weather conditions or personal reasons may be subject to change. Please understand that the fees will not be refunded.

6. Smoking is prohibited aboard the bus in accordance with the law.

7. Pets and animals are not allowed on the vehicle.

8. Emergency contact: (Toll Free) +1(866)585-8747.

shopify_mapping.title: [Silver] Whistler 1-Day Tour(Departures on Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Sundays, with additional Fridays from May to September)
shopify_mapping.bodyHtml:
Highlights

  • Visit the beauty of Whistler and explore all that it has to offer.
  • Take a trip down the beautiful Sea to Sky Highway! 
  • Sea to Sky Highway offers the best views year-round! 
  • Explore one of the most popular stops at the magnificent Shannon Falls!
  • The best way to view Whistler and Black Comb mountain is to ride the Peak 2 Peak Gondola!
  • Embark on the legendary Sea to Sky Highway. Capture stunning views, discover waterfalls, soar by gondola, and arrive in the charming embrace of Whistler Village.
  • Soar to new heights on the Sea to Sky Gondola, a breathtaking journey from the ocean to the mountains.
  • Stroll the vibrant, pedestrian-only core of Whistler Village and experience a world-class mountain resort.
  • Experience the magic of Porteau Cove, a scenic oasis on the Sea-to-Sky known for its iconic pier, diving wrecks, and starlit campsites.

Departure Date

10/20/2025-04/30/2026: Tuesday, Thursday, Sunday
05/01/2026-10/19/2026: Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, Sunday
10/20/2026-04/30/2027: Tuesday, Thursday, Sunday
Minimum of 1 person is required to be operated.
If children are included in the order, please note the age of the child in advance when booking the trip, otherwise the mandatory items will be charged on site as adult rate.

Cost Includes

1. Transportation. (The type of vehicle used will be based on the number of guests attending that day).

2. Bilingual tour guide or driver-guide.

Cost Excludes

1. 5% GST of all prices quoted in Canadian dollars.

2. Food and beverage.

3. Attraction admission fee (Prices are subject to change without prior notice; Tickets should be purchased from the tour guide).

4. Service fee (Minimum payment per person per day is USD$15/CAD$20, Any child and Infant reserving a seat have to pay the service fees as well).

5. Any personal expenses are not listed in Fee Included.

Cancellation Policy

1. If the weather condition, war, general strikes, and other unforeseen circumstances interrupt the journey, our company reserves the right to rearrange the journey without refunding the tour fee. 

2. Cancellation & Re-schedule Policy:

    a.  More than 15 days prior to departure date (EST): Free cancellation with full refund. Please reconfirm the penalty for the added hotel or flight ticket.

    b.  Less than 14 days but 8 days prior to departure date (EST): 50% of total purchase amount can be refunded.

    c.  Less than 7 days prior to departure date (EST) or on departure day (EST): 100% penalty. No refund. 

    d.  Additional hotel bookings before or after the tour as well as other services are subject to hotel cancellation policy to determine if a refund is possible.

    e.  If the guest quit during the trip or fails to participate in any itinerary due to personal reasons (no travel documents, late arrival, illness, accident, etc.), the paid tour fare will not be refunded, and no other services will be compensated.

 

Know Before You Book

Know Before You Book

1. Customer under 18 years old MUST be accompanied by at least one adult. If the order includes children, please make sure to inform our customer service of the age of the children in advance when placing the order, otherwise the children will be charged on-site according as adults. In consideration of the guest safety, pregnant women are only allowed to join the tour if pregnant for 24 weeks or less by the end of the trip.

2. Please be sure to provide accurate and complete information upon booking. This includes name, gender, valid contact information (preferably a mobile phone), accurate tour location, etc., This helps to avoid any errors upon the reservation because errors affect travel. Any losses due to inaccurate or invalid information will be at your own cost and the company will not be held responsible. 

3. This tour does not accept any City Pass or your own tickets for any of the attractions. Tour attraction admission charges and meal expenses are subject to change at any time without notification. Any purchased ticket cannot be refunded for lower prices.

4. During the actual trip, the tour guide or driver has the right to appropriately adjust the tour sequence, stay time or assembly time of scenic spots according to the weather, traffic, and other conditions to ensure the smooth progress of the trip.

5. If any scenic spots are temporarily closed, including on certain holidays, the tour guide will make appropriate adjustments based on the actual situation, which may include viewing from the outside or substituting with another attraction to maintain the richness of the itinerary. Please note that the opening hours and capacity limits of certain attractions and national parks may change from time to time due to health concerns. Should such changes affect the itinerary, they will be considered force majeure. We appreciate your understanding.

6. Children under the age of 8 require a booster seat in order to participate in the tour group. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday provide the rental service for $10.00/person/day. Please make a request when booking the itinerary so that we may have the booster seat ready in advance. Please understand that the violations and fines are borne by the guests themselves. There is no need for a booster seat for bus travel on the day of travel, and the fee can be refunded to the guest.

7. Normal health conditions are required to participate and enjoy our full itineraries. Contact us for specific policies or information regarding passengers with disabilities and the handicapped who do need to provide advance notification to make a reservation. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday do not guarantee a wheelchair lift-equipped bus and/or seating availability to disabled passengers without prior notification and approval.

8. In order to make your trip more complete, pleasant and smooth, we strongly recommend that you choose to book event tickets, catering packages, etc. when making your order, and we do not provide any additional booking services within 7 days before the departure date and during the tour.

9. The price in the system is US dollars including tax. If you need to pay in CAD dollars, all CAD dollar prices do not include 5% GST.

10. Guests are required to bring their own relevant documents and materials required for entry or cross-border travel. Whether they can enter or leave the country is subject to the decision of the customs of each country. The inability to enter the country is a force majeure factor, and the paid tour fee will not be refunded.

11. We may alter these terms and conditions from time to time and post the new version on our agents’ website. It is your responsibility to check the [Terms & Conditions] on their website regularly and prior to making a reservation. Unless specifically stated otherwise herein or required by law, JUPITER LEGEND Corporation shall not be liable for any consequential, compensatory, indirect, incidental or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with the performance of its obligations under these terms and conditions.

12. Due to the continuous rise in fuel prices leading to a sharp increase in vehicle operating costs, effective for all tours departing on May 18, 2026, a transportation surcharge of CAD 5 per person per day will be applied to our tour products. The fee will be collected by tour guides during the trip.

 

Know Before You Go

1. The maximal waiting time for any late passengers is 10 minutes beyond the meeting time announced by the Tour Guide. While JUPITER LEGEND Corporation makes every effort to provide on-time service, it does not guarantee to arrive at or depart from any point.as a specific time, which may be affected by any number of factors including weather, traffic, strikes, government shutdowns, war or terrorist attacks, or mechanical prob- lems. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation is not liable for any inconvenience or expense caused as a result of such a delay, not liable for the expense of connecting air or train or bus service missed as a result of a delay and not liable for any other travel expense caused as a result of a delay.

2. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday reserve the right, when operating conditions require, transferring passengers from one vehicle to another en route.

3. The following documents are recommended to make your check-in process smooth: A valid photo ID is required to board the bus; We recommend you bring a copy of the email confirmation to board the bus.

4. This product is a group activity. If you choose to leave the group, please inform in advance, and obtain the consent of the tour guide. You need to sign the departure agreement form and the unfinished part will be regarded as your own abandonment. The group fee will not be refunded.

5. Gift items in the itinerary that cannot be given away due to force majeure factors such as traffic and weather conditions or personal reasons may be subject to change. Please understand that the fees will not be refunded.

6. Smoking is prohibited aboard the bus in accordance with the law.

7. Pets and animals are not allowed on the vehicle.

8. Emergency contact: (Toll Free) +1(866)585-8747.
